A collaborative list of awesome Swift libraries and resources. Feel free to contribute!

Guides

An awesome list of Swift related guides.

Newsletter

back to top

  • Swift Developments - A weekly curated newsletter containing for people interested in designing and developing their own iOS, watchOS and Apple TV apps.
  • Swift Newsletter by Natasha the Robot (discontinued, look the archive) - Curated newsletter.
  • Swift Weekly Brief - A multi author curated newsletter.

Official Guides

back to top

  • API Design Guidelines - Official Swift API design guidelines.
  • Apple eBook - Official Apple eBook for Swift beginners.
  • Getting Started - Find information about the how to use the Swift programming language.

Style Guides

back to top

  • Airbnbstars1.2k - Airbnb's Official Style Guide.
  • Google - This style guide is based on Apple’s excellent Swift standard library style and also incorporates feedback from usage across multiple Swift projects within Google.
  • LinkedInstars1.3k - LinkedIn's Official Style Guide.
  • Raywenderlichstars11.4k - Raywenderlich guide, a must read.

Third party Guides

back to top

  • 30 Days of Swiftstars11.2k - A cool 30 days tutorial.
  • About Swiftstars61 - A playground about the Swift language.
  • Awesome Swift Educationstars5.4k - An organized list of essential Swift Language Topics.
  • Conferences.digitalstars758 - Watch conference videos in a native macOS app.
  • Developing iOS Apps with Swift - Stanford course by Paul Hegarty.
  • Hacking With Swift - Complete training course that teaches app development through 30 hands-on projects, for free.
  • Ray Wenderlich Tutorials, Videos, Podcasts and books - High quality programming tutorials.
  • Swift Education - A community of educators sharing materials for teaching Swift and app development.
  • swift-tipsstars839 - A series of useful tips by Vincent Pradeilles.
  • SwiftDoc - Auto-generated documentation.
  • SwiftGuide CNstars15.4k - A Chinese written guide.
  • SwiftTipsstars3.7k - A collection of useful tips by John Sundell.
  • The Swift Web Developer - A publication for Swift Web Developers.
  • whats-new-in-swift-4stars1.9k - An Xcode playground showcasing the new features in Swift 4.0.

Boilerplates

  • iOS project templatestars362 - iOS project template with fastlane lanes, Travis CI jobs and GitHub integrations of Codecov, HoundCI for SwiftLint and Danger.
  • Swift Module Templatestars344 - An opinionated starting point for awesome, reusable modules.

REPL

  • Online Swift Playground - Online Swift Playground.

Editor Support

Support for your favorite editors.

Emacs

back to top

  • swift-modestars311 - Emacs support, including partial flycheck error support.

Vim

back to top

  • swift-vimstars743 - Vim runtime files.
  • vim-polyglotstars4.4k - Language pack for vim that includes vim-swift.

Benchmark

  • xcprofilerstars312 - Command line utility to profile compilation time.

Converters

  • Swiftify - Objective-C to Swift online code converter and Xcode extension.
  • Zolangstars128 - A DSL for generating code in multiple programming languages.

Other Awesome Lists

Check out apps on these projects:

  • Awesome iOS Interviewstars777 - List of the questions that helps you to prepare for the interview.
  • awesome-macOSstars12.1k - A curated list of awesome applications, softwares, tools and shiny things for macOS.
  • example-ios-appsstars488 - An amazing list for people who are beginners and learning ios development and for ios developers who need any example app or feature.
  • open-source-ios-appsstars27.2k - A collaborative list of open-source iOS Apps.
  • open-source-mac-os-appsstars26.3k - Awesome list of open source applications for macOS.

Dependency Managers

Dependency manager software for Swift.

  • Acciostars622 - A SwiftPM based dependency manager for iOS & Co. with improvements over Carthage.
  • Carthagestars14.3k - A new dependency manager.
  • CocoaPodsstars13.2k - The most used dependency manager.
  • Mintstars1.6k - A package manager that installs and runs Swift command line tools.
  • swift-package-managerstars8.3k - SPM is the Package Manager for the Swift Programming Language.

Patterns

  • App Architecturestars1.8k - A sample Code of the App Architecture Book.
  • CleanArchitectureRxSwiftstars3.1k - Example of Clean Architecture of iOS app using RxSwift.
  • Design-Patterns-In-Swiftstars12.6k - Design Patterns.
  • Reactantstars374 - Reactant is a reactive architecture for iOS.
  • Spinstars97 - Provides a versatile Feedback Loop implementation working with RxSwift, ReactiveSwift and Combine.
  • StateViewControllerstars294 - Stateful UIVIewController composition — the MVC cure for Massive View Controllers.
  • Viperitstars407 - Viper Framework for iOS.

Misc

Miscellaneous Swift related projects

  • Beakstars541 - A command line interface for your Swift scripts.
  • CodableWrappersstars225 - A Collection of PropertyWrappers to make custom Serialization of Codable Types easy.
  • Fugenstars43 - A command line tool for exporting resources and generating code from your Figma files.
  • Model2Appstars118 - Turn your data model into a working CRUD app.
  • SwagGenstars404 - A command line tool for generating a REST API from a Swagger spec based off Stencil templates.
  • Swiftbrewstars131 - Homebrew for Swift packages.
  • SwiftGenstars7.1k - A suite of tools to auto-generate code for various assets of your project.
  • SwiftKitstars788 - Start your next Open-Source Swift Framework 📦.
  • SwiftPlatestars1.7k - Easily generate cross platform framework projects from the command line.
  • Toyboxstars129 - Xcode Playground management made easy.
  • Tuiststars1.7k - An open source command line tool to create, maintain and interact with your Xcode projects at scale.
  • xcbeautifystars385 - Little beautifier tool for xcodebuild.
  • XcodeGenstars4.4k - Tool for generating Xcode projects from a YAML file and your project directory.
  • xcodeprojstars1.4k - A library to read, update and write Xcode projects and workspaces.

Libs

Here you can find a list of snippets and libs for your Swift projects.

Accessibility

back to top

  • Capablestars191 - Keep track of accessibility settings, leverage high contrast colors, and use scalable fonts to enable users with disabilities to use your app.

AI

Libs for AI based projects (Machine Learning, Neural Networks etc). back to top

  • CoreML-Modelsstars5.1k - A collection of unique Core ML Models.
  • DL4Sstars57 - Automatic differentiation, fast tensor operations and dynamic neural networks from CNNs and RNNs to transformers.

Algorithm

back to top

  • Algorithmstars790 - A toolset for writing algorithms and probability models.
  • BTreestars1.2k - Fast sorted collections for Swift using in-memory B-trees.
  • swift-algorithm-clubstars24.8k - Algorithms and data structures, with explanations.
  • SwiftLCSstars207 - implementation of the longest common subsequence (LCS) algorithm.

Analytics

Analytics related libraries to easily track your app usage back to top

  • Umbrellastars527 - Analytics abstraction layer.

Animation

Libs to help with animation back to top

  • Advancestars4.4k - A powerful animation framework for iOS, tvOS, and OS X.
  • ChainPageCollectionViewstars762 - Fancy two-level collection view layout and animation.
  • Cometsstars557 - Animating Particles.
  • DKChainableAnimationKitstars1.9k - Easy to read and write chainable animations.
  • Easestars1.2k - Animate everything with Ease.
  • EasyAnimationstars2.9k - A library to take the power of UIView.animateWithDuration(_:, animations:...) to a whole new level.
  • Elephantstars107 - Elegant SVG animation kit.
  • FlightAnimatorstars589 - Natural Blocks Based Core Animation Framework.
  • Geministars2.9k - Gemini is rich scroll based animation framework.
  • IBAnimatablestars8.5k - Design and prototype UI, interaction, navigation, transition and animation for App Store ready Apps in Interface Builder with IBAnimatable.
  • Interpolatestars1.8k - Interpolation framework for creating interactive gesture-driven animations.
  • Kinietastars37 - An simple Animation Engine for iOS with an Intuitive API and Readable Code.
  • lottie-iosstars21.6k - An iOS library to natively render After Effects vector animations.
  • Pastelstars3.3k - Gradient animation effect like Instagram.
  • Poistars58 - Poi makes you use card UI like tinder UI .You can use it like tableview method.
  • Presentationstars3k - A library to help you to make tutorials, release notes and animated pages.
  • Pulsatorstars1.3k - Pulse animation for iOS.
  • Sicastars987 - Simple Interface Core Animation. Run type-safe animation sequencially or parallelly.
  • Springstars13.9k - A library to simplify iOS animations.
  • SpriteKitEasingSwiftstars104 - Better Easing for SpriteKit.
  • spruce-iosstars3.1k - Choreograph animations on the screen.
  • Stellarstars2.9k - A Physical animation library.
  • TheAnimationstars214 - Type-safe CAAnimation wrapper. It makes preventing to set wrong type values.
  • ViewAnimatorstars6.2k - Brings your UI to life with just one line.
  • YapAnimatorstars1.9k - Your fast and friendly physics-based animation system.

API

Quick libs to get access to third party API services back to top

  • GitHubAPIstars55 - Implementation of GitHub REST API v3.
  • PXGoogleDirectionsstars268 - Google Directions API helper.
  • RandomUserSwiftstars95 - Framework to Generate Random Users - An Unofficial SDK for randomuser.me.
  • reddiftstars216 - reddit API wrapper.
  • Swifter Twitterstars2.3k - Twitter framework.
  • SwiftInstagramstars570 - Instagram API wrapper.
  • Swiftkubestars55 - Swift client for Kubernetes.
  • SwiftlySalesforcestars115 - Framework for rapid development of native iOS apps that integrate with Salesforce.
  • SwiftyInstastars178 - Private and Tokenless Instagram RESTful API.

App Routing

Internal app routing systems. back to top

  • Appzstars1.1k - Launch external apps and deeplink with ease.
  • Crossroadstars329 - Crossroad is an URL router focused on handling Custom URL Schemes.
  • LightRoutestars90 - Routing between VIPER modules.
  • Linkerstars129 - Lightweight way to handle internal and external deeplinks for iOS.
  • MonarchRouterstars30 - Declarative state- and URL-based router. Complex automatic View Controllers hierarchy transitions. Time-tested server-side conventions.
  • RxFlowstars1.5k - RxFlow is a navigation framework for iOS applications based on a Reactive Flow Coordinator pattern.
  • SwiftRouterstars259 - A URL Router for iOS.
  • URLNavigatorstars2.6k - Elegant URL Routing.

App Store

Libs to help with apple app store, in app purchases and receipt validation. back to top

  • Apphudstars94 - Lightweight library to easily handle auto-renewable subscriptions with no backend required.
  • InAppPurchasestars205 - A Simple, Lightweight and Safe framework for In App Purchase.
  • merchantkitstars973 - A modern In-App Purchases management framework for iOS.
  • SwiftyStoreKitstars5.5k - Lightweight In App Purchases framework.

Audio

Libs to work with audio back to top

  • AudioKitstars8.4k - Powerful audio synthesis, processing and analysis, without the steep learning curve.
  • AudioPlayerstars621 - A wrapper around AVPlayer with some cool features.
  • AudioPlayerSwiftstars223 - AudioPlayer is a simple class for playing audio (basic and advanced usage) in iOS, OS X and tvOS apps.
  • Beethovenstars612 - An audio processing library for pitch detection of musical signals.
  • FDSoundActivatedRecorderstars233 - Start recording when the user speaks.
  • FDWaveformViewstars1k - An easy way to display an audio waveform in your app.
  • ModernAVPlayerstars191 - Persistence AVPlayer to resume playback after bad network connection even in background mode.
  • MusicKitstars566 - A framework for composing and transforming music.
  • Soundablestars80 - Soundable allows you to play sounds, single and in sequence, in a very easy way.
  • SwiftAudioPlayerstars212 - Simple audio player for iOS that streams and performs realtime audio manipulations with AVAudioEngine.
  • SwiftySoundstars1k - Simple library that lets you play sounds with a single line of code.
  • voice-overlay-iosstars444 - An overlay that gets your user’s voice permission and input as text in a customizable UI.

Augmented Reality

back to top

  • ARKit-CoreLocationstars4.9k - Combines the high accuracy of AR with the scale of GPS data.
  • ARKit-Navigationstars268 - Navigation in augmented reality with MapKit.
  • ARVideoKitstars1.3k - Capture & record ARKit videos, photos, Live Photos, and GIFs.
  • ARVoxelKitstars68 - Voxel graphic framework using ARKit.
  • Polystars75 - Unofficial Google Poly SDK – explore the world of 3D.

Authentication

Easy way to manage auth in your apps. back to top

  • Celystars0 - A Plug-n-Play login framework.
  • InstagramLoginstars58 - Simple way to authenticate Instagram accounts.
  • LinkedInSignInstars31 - Simple view controller to log in and retrieve an access token from LinkedIn.
  • LoginKitstars646 - LoginKit is a quick and easy way to add a Login/Signup UX to your iOS app.
  • ReCaptchastars210 - [In]visible ReCaptcha for iOS.
  • SpotifyLoginstars329 - Authenticate with the Spotify API.

Bots

Libs to build bot back to top

  • Telegram Bot SDKstars279 - Unofficial SDK.
  • Telegrammerstars254 - Open-source framework for Telegram Bots developers. It was built on top of Apple/SwiftNIO which help to demonstrate excellent performance.

Cache

back to top

  • AwesomeCachestars1.2k - Manage cache easy.
  • Cachestars2.3k - Nothing but Cache.
  • CachyKitstars102 - A Caching Library that can cache JSON, Image, Zip or AnyObject with expiry date/TTYL and force refresh.
  • Cachyrstars118 - A small key-value data cache for iOS, macOS and tvOS.
  • Carlosstars572 - A simple but flexible cache.
  • EVURLCachestars288 - If you want to make your app still works when it's offline.
  • MemoryCachestars67 - Type-safe memory cache.

Chart

back to top

  • Chartsstars24.2k - Beautiful charts for iOS/tvOS/OSX (port of MPAndroidChart).
  • ChartViewstars3.2k - Swift package for displaying beautiful charts effortlessly
  • PNChart-Swiftstars1.4k - A simple and beautiful chart lib with animation.
  • ScrollableGraphViewstars5.2k - Adaptive scrollable graph view for iOS to visualise simple discrete datasets.
  • SwiftChartstars960 - A simple line and area charting library for iOS. Supports multiple series, partially filled series and touch events.
  • SwiftChartsstars2.3k - Highly customizable charts for iOS.
  • TKRadarChartstars200 - A customizable radar chart.

Chat

Libs to get access to build chat app back to top

  • Chattostars4.2k - A lightweight framework to build chat applications.
  • InputBarAccessoryViewstars825 - A simple and easily customizable InputAccessoryView for making powerful input bars with autocomplete and attachments.
  • MessageKitstars4.7k - A community-driven replacement for JSQMessagesViewController.
  • MessengerKitstars1.4k - A UI framework for building messenger interfaces.
  • Real-time Chat with Firebasestars429 - Functional real-time chat app with Firebase Firestore using MessageKit.

Colors

Interesting snippets related to color management and utility. back to top

  • ChromaColorPickerstars450 - An intuitive and fun iOS color picker.
  • ColorKitstars395 - Advanced color manipulation for iOS.
  • DynamicColorstars2.6k - An extension to manipulate colors easily.
  • Gradientsstars727 - A curated collection of splendid 180+ gradients.
  • HexColorstars101 - Define UIColors as Hex integers.
  • Huestars3.2k - Hue is the all-in-one coloring utility that you'll ever need.
  • PrettyColorsstars167 - Styles and colors text in the Terminal with ANSI escape codes. Conforms to ECMA Standard 48.
  • SheetyColorsstars96 - An action sheet styled color picker for iOS.
  • SwiftGen-Colorsstars7.1k - A tool to auto-generate enums for your UIColor constants.
  • SwiftHEXColorsstars661 - HEX color handling as an extension for UIColor.
  • UIColor-Hex-Swiftstars1.1k - Hex to UIColor converter.
  • UIGradientstars212 - A simple and powerful library for using gradient layer, image, color.

Command Line

Create command line applications. back to top

  • Commanderstars1.4k - Compose beautiful command line interfaces.
  • CommandLinestars1.1k - Library for creating command-line interfaces.
  • Guakastars1.1k - The smart and beautiful (POSIX compliant) command line framework.
  • LineNoisestars90 - A zero-dependency replacement for readline.
  • nefstars229 - A set of command line tools that lets you have compile time verification of your documentation written as Xcode Playground.
  • Progress.swiftstars270 - Add beautiful progress bars to your command line.
  • Swift Argument Parserstars2.1k - Straightforward, type-safe argument parsing for Swift.
  • SwiftCLIstars687 - A powerful framework that can be used to develop a CLI.
  • Swiftlinestars1.2k - A set of tools to help you create command line applications.
  • SwiftShellstars876 - A library for creating command-line applications and running shell commands.
  • SwiftyTextTablestars257 - A lightweight library to generate text tables.

Concurrency

Easier ways to work with concurrency. back to top

  • AsyncNinjastars148 - A complete set of concurrency and reactive programming primitives.
  • Futuresstars56 - Lightweight promises for iOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, and server-side.
  • GroupWorkstars41 - Easy concurrent, asynchronous tasks.
  • Hydrastars1.9k - Promises & Await - Write better async code.
  • Kommanderstars167 - Manage the task execution in different threads through Kommands.
  • Queuerstars968 - A queue manager, built on top of OperationQueue and Dispatch (aka GCD).
  • SwiftCoroutinestars699 - Coroutines for iOS, macOS and Linux.
  • Throttlerstars33 - Throttle massive number of asynchronous inputs in a single drop of one line API.
  • Venicestars1.5k - Communicating sequential processes (CSP), Linux ready.

Currency

back to top

  • Moneystars927 - Currency formatter.

Data Management

back to top

Core Data

No more pain with Core Data, here are some interesting libs to handle data management. back to top

  • AERecordstars306 - Super awesome Core Data wrapper library for iOS.
  • AlecrimCoreDatastars779 - Simple Core Data wrapper library.
  • CloudCorestars68 - Robust CloudKit synchronization: offline editing, relationships, shared and public databases, and more.
  • CoreStorestars2.9k - simple and elegant way to handle Core Data.
  • DataKernelstars12 - DataKernel is a minimalistic wrapper around Core Data stack to ease persistence operations. No external dependencies.
  • Graphstars856 - An elegant data-driven framework for Core Data.
  • JSQCoreDataKitstars561 - A swifter Core Data stack.
  • JustPersiststars158 - Easiest and safest way to do persistence on iOS with Core Data support out of the box.
  • QueryKitstars1.4k - An easy way to play with Core Data filtering.
  • Skopelosstars230 - A minimalistic, thread safe, non-boilerplate and super easy to use version of Active Record on Core Data.
  • SugarRecordstars2.1k - Helps with Core Data and Realm.

CSV

Helpful libraries to parse from and serialize to comma-separated value representations. back to top

  • CodableCSVstars253 - Read and write CSV files row-by-row or through Swift's Codable interface.
  • CSVParserstars73 - Fast parser for CSV.

Firebase

back to top

  • Ballcapstars219 - Ballcap is a database schema design framework for Cloud Firestore.

GraphQL

back to top

  • SociableWeaverstars60 - Build declarative GraphQL queries and mutations.

JSON

Struggling using json data? Here are some interesting ways to handle it. back to top

  • AlamofireObjectMapperstars2.6k - An Alamofire extension which converts JSON response data into objects using ObjectMapper.
  • Alembicstars115 - Functional JSON parsing, mapping to objects, and serialize to JSON.
  • Argostars3.5k - JSON parsing library.
  • Arrowstars356 - Elegant JSON Parsing.
  • Decodablestars1k - JSON parsing.
  • Elevatestars621 - JSON parsing framework that makes parsing simple, reliable and composable.
  • EVReflectionstars959 - Reflection based JSON encoding and decoding. Including support for NSDictionary, NSCoding, Printable, Hashable and Equatable.
  • Freddystars1.1k - A reusable framework for parsing JSON.
  • Glossstars1.6k - Shiny JSON parsing library.
  • HandyJSONstars3.7k - A handy JSON-object serialization/deserialization library.
  • Himotokistars789 - A type-safe JSON decoding library.
  • JASONstars1k - JSON parsing with outstanding performances and convenient operators.
  • JSONHelperstars791 - Lightning fast JSON deserialization and value conversion library for iOS & OS X.
  • JSONNeverDiestars466 - Auto reflection tool from JSON to Model, user friendly JSON encoder / decoder, aims to never die.
  • ObjectMapperstars8.7k - JSON object mapper.
  • PMJSONstars362 - JSON encoding/decoding library.
  • SwiftyJSONstars20.5k - A lib for JSON with error handling.
  • SwiftyJSONAcceleratorstars870 - macOS app to generate Swift 5 models for JSON (with Codeable).
  • Unboxstars2k - The easy to use JSON decoder.

Key Value Store

back to top

  • Defaultstars465 - Modern interface to UserDefaults + Codable support.
  • Defaultsstars765 - Strongly-typed UserDefaults with support for Codable and key observation.
  • DefaultsKitstars1.4k - Simple, Strongly Typed UserDefaults for iOS, macOS and tvOS.
  • Prephirencesstars548 - Manage application preferences, NSUserDefaults, iCloud, Keychain and more.
  • SecureDefaultsstars180 - A lightweight wrapper over UserDefaults & NSUserDefaults with an extra AES-256 encryption layer.
  • Storezstars64 - Safe, statically-typed, store-agnostic key-value storage.
  • SwiftStorestars105 - A Key-Value store backed by LevelDB.
  • SwiftyUserDefaultsstars4.4k - Cleaner, nicer syntax for NSUserDefaults.
  • UserDefaultsStorestars417 - Why not use UserDefaults to store Codable objects 😉.
  • Zephyrstars731 - Effortlessly synchronize NSUserDefaults over iCloud.

MongoDB

back to top

  • MongoKittenstars609 - MongoDB Connector.
  • Perfect-MongoDBstars52 - A stand-alone wrapper around the mongo-c client library, enabling access to MongoDB servers.

Multi Database

Data management layers that involve multiple sources. back to top

  • ModelAssistantstars27 - Elegant library to manage the interactions between view and model.
  • PersistenceKitstars123 - Store and retrieve Codable objects to various persistence layers, in a couple lines of code!
  • Shallowsstars611 - Your lightweight persistence toolbox.

ORM

back to top

  • fluentstars1.1k - Simple ActiveRecord implementation.
  • Perfect-CRUDstars51 - CRUD is an object-relational mapping (ORM) system using Codable protocol.

Other Data

Other ways to persist data back to top

  • CoreXLSXstars505 - Excel spreadsheet (XLSX) format support.
  • Diskstars2.9k - Delightful framework for iOS to easily persist structs, images, and data.
  • EVCloudKitDaostars620 - Simplified access to CloudKit with support for subscriptions and local caching.
  • KeyPathKitstars382 - KeyPathKit provides a seamless syntax to manipulate data using typed keypaths.
  • LeetCode-Swiftstars3.8k - Solutions to LeetCode interview questions.
  • Pencilstars83 - Write any value to file.
  • StorageManagerstars42 - Safe and easy way to use FileManager as Database.

Realm

back to top

  • Realmstars14.5k - Realm is a mobile database: a replacement for Core Data & SQLite.

  • RealmWrapperstars57 - Safe and easy wrappers for RealmSwift.
  • Unrealmstars437 - Unrealm enables you to easily store Swift native Classes, Structs and Enums into Realm.

SQL drivers

back to top

  • MySQL Swiftstars149 - MySQL client library.
  • Perfect-MySQLstars109 - A stand-alone wrapper around the MySQL client library, enabling access to MySQL servers.
  • Perfect-PostgreSQLstars48 - A stand-alone wrapper around the libpq client library, enabling access to PostgreSQL servers.

SQLite

Are you interested in storing your app data using SQLite? Here are some interesting resources. back to top

  • AEXMLstars911 - xml wrapper.
  • CheatyXMLstars23 - A powerful framework designed to manage XML easily.
  • SwiftyXMLstars92 - The most swifty way to deal with XML.
  • SWXMLHashstars1.2k - Simple XML parsing.
  • XMLCoderstars481 - XMLEncoder & XMLDecoder based on Codable protocols from the standard library.

back to top

  • YamlSwiftstars367 - Load YAML and JSON documents.
  • Yamsstars715 - Sweet YAML parser.

back to top

Date

Handle data formatting easily. back to top

  • AnyDatestars179 - Date & Time API inspired from Java 8 DateTime API.
  • Chronologystars1.9k - Building a better date/time library.
  • DateHelperstars1.2k - Simple date helper.
  • Datezstars254 - Library for dealing with NSDate, NSCalendar, NSDateComponents, and NSTimeInterval.
  • Datifystars44 - Easypeasy date functions.
  • NVDatestars176 - Date extension library.
  • SwiftDatestars6.3k - Easy NSDate Management.
  • SwiftMomentstars1.6k - A time and calendar manipulation library.
  • Timestars1k - Type-safe time calculations, powered by generics.
  • Timepiecestars2.6k - Intuitive NSDate extensions.
  • TrueTime.swiftstars467 - Get the true current time impervious to device clock time changes (NTP library).

Dependency Injection

Dependency injection libs back to top

  • Cleansestars1.6k - A Lightweight Dependency Injection Framework by Square.
  • Corridorstars57 - A Coreader-like Dependency Injection μFramework.
  • Delistars125 - Deli is an easy-to-use Dependency Injection(DI).
  • DIKitstars80 - Dependency Injection Framework for Swift, inspired by KOIN.
  • Dipstars892 - A simple Dependency Injection Container.
  • DITranquillitystars346 - Dependency injection framework with tranquility.
  • Locatablestars107 - A micro-framework that leverages Property Wrappers to implement the Service Locator pattern.
  • Purestars295 - A way to do a dependency injection without a DI container.
  • Swinjectstars4.6k - A dependency injection framework.
  • Typhoonstars2.7k - Dependency injection toolkit.
  • Weaverstars557 - A declarative, easy-to-use and safe Dependency Injection framework.

Device

A collection of libs to recognize your device. back to top

  • Devicestars1.5k - Light weight tool for detecting the current device and screen size.
  • Device.swiftstars216 - Super-lightweight library to detect used device.
  • DeviceKitstars3.3k - DeviceKit is a value-type replacement of UIDevice.
  • Deviicestars41 - Swift library to easily check the current device and some more info about it.
  • Luminousstars298 - Get everything you need to know about the device.
  • Thingystars51 - A modern device detection and querying library.
  • UIDeviceCompletestars391 - UIDevice extensions that fill in the missing pieces.

Documentation

Generate documentation for Swift code back to top

  • jazzystars6.9k - Soulful docs.

Events

Alternatives to NSNotificationCenter, Key-Value-Observation, or delegation. back to top

  • Bondstars4.1k - Binding framework.
  • BrightFuturesstars1.9k - Promise and future lib.
  • Combinativestars99 - UI event handling using Apple's combine framework.
  • EasyFuturesstars40 - 🔗Futures & Promises. Easy to use. Highly combinable.
  • EmitterKitstars571 - Implementation of event emitters and listeners.
  • FutureKitstars761 - Future/Promises Library.
  • Katanastars2.1k - Write apps a la React and Redux.
  • LightweightObservablestars124 - A lightweight implementation of an observable sequence that you can subscribe to.
  • NoticeObserveKitstars148 - NoticeObserveKit is type-safe NotificationCenter wrapper that associates notice type with info type.
  • Notificationzstars74 - Helping you own NSNotificationCenter by providing a simple, customizable adapter.
  • Observablestars348 - The easiest way to observe values.
  • OpenCombinestars1.8k - Open source implementation of Apple's Combine framework for processing values over time.
  • PMKVObserverstars707 - Modern thread-safe and type-safe key-value observing.
  • PromiseKitstars13.4k - Async promise programming lib.
  • ReactiveCocoastars20k - ReactiveCocoa (RAC) is a Cocoa framework inspired by Functional Reactive Programming. It provides APIs for composing and transforming streams of values over time.
  • ReactorKitstars2.1k - A framework for reactive and unidirectional application architecture.
  • ReSwiftstars6.9k - Unidirectional Data Flow.
  • RxReducestars122 - Reactive implementation of the state container pattern (like Redux). It is based on the simple concepts of state immutability and unidirectionnal data flow.
  • RxSwiftstars20.1k - Microsoft Reactive Extensions (Rx).
  • Signalsstars440 - Replaces delegates and notifications.
  • Snailstars165 - An Observables framework.
  • SwiftEventBusstars953 - A publish/subscribe event bus optimized for iOS.
  • Tempurastars614 - A holistic approach to iOS development, inspired by Redux and MVVM.
  • Tokamakstars1.2k - React-like declarative API for building native UI components with easy to use one-way data binding.
  • Tomorrowlandstars105 - Lightweight Promises.
  • TopicEventBusstars53 - Publish–subscribe design pattern implementation framework, with ability to publish events by topic.
  • VueFluxstars316 - Unidirectional Data Flow State Management Architecture - Inspired by Vuex and Flux.
  • Whenstars253 - A lightweight implementation of Promises.

Files

back to top

  • FileKitstars2.1k - Simple and expressive file management.
  • FileProviderstars739 - FileManager replacement for Local, iCloud and Remote (WebDAV/FTP/Dropbox/OneDrive/SMB2) files for iOS/tvOS and macOS.
  • KZFileWatchersstars995 - A micro-framework for observing file changes, both local and remote.

Images

An interesting list of image related libs.. back to top

  • Agrumestars462 - A lemony fresh iOS image viewer.
  • AlamofireImagestars3.7k - AlamofireImage is an image component library for Alamofire.
  • APNGKitstars1.8k - High performance and delightful way to play with APNG format in iOS.
  • ATGMediaBrowserstars189 - Image slide-show viewer with multiple predefined transition styles, and with ability to create new transitions with ease.
  • AXPhotoViewerstars554 - An iPhone/iPad photo gallery viewer, useful for viewing a large (or small!) number of photos.
  • BlockiesSwiftstars48 - Unique blocky identicons/profile picture generator.
  • Brightroomstars2.2k - An image editor and engine using CoreImage.
  • CTPanoramaViewstars959 - A library that displays spherical or cylindrical panoramas with touch or motion based controls.
  • DTPhotoViewerControllerstars211 - A fully customizable photo viewer ViewController to display single photo or collection of photos, inspired by Facebook photo viewer.
  • FacebookImagePickerstars219 - Facebook album photo picker.
  • FlexibleImagestars803 - A simple way to play with images.
  • FMPhotoPickerstars476 - A modern, simple and zero-dependency photo picker with an elegant and customizable image editor.
  • gifustars2.5k - Highly performant animated GIF support for iOS.
  • GPUImage 2stars4.6k - GPUImage 2 is a BSD-licensed framework for GPU-accelerated video and image processing.
  • GPUImage 3stars2.2k - GPUImage 3 is a BSD-licensed framework for GPU-accelerated video and image processing using Metal.
  • HanekeSwiftstars5.1k - A lightweight generic cache for iOS with extra love for images.
  • ImageDetectstars291 - Detect and crop faces, barcodes and texts in image with iOS 11 Vision API.
  • ImageLoaderstars291 - A lightweight and fast image loader for iOS.
  • ImageScoutstars944 - Implementation of fastimage - supports PNG, GIF, and JPEG.
  • ImageViewerstars2.4k - An image viewer à la Twitter.
  • ImgixSwiftstars20 - Easily update image urls to be fast and responsive.
  • JLStickerTextViewstars458 - A UIImageView allow you to add multiple Label (multiple line text support) on it, you can edit, rotate, resize the Label as you want with one finger ,then render the text on Image.
  • Kanvasstars218 - A iOS library for adding effects, drawings, text, stickers, and making GIFs from existing media or the camera.
  • Kingfisherstars18.4k - Image download and caching.
  • LetterAvatarKitstars188 - A UIImage extension that generates letter-based avatars.
  • Lightboxstars1.4k - A convenient and easy to use image viewer for your iOS app.
  • MapleBaconstars325 - Image download and caching library.
  • MCScratchImageViewstars346 - A custom ImageView that is used to cover the surface of other view like a scratch card, user can swipe the mulch to see the view below.
  • Moastars318 - An image download extension of the image view for iOS, tvOS and macOS.
  • Nukestars6k - Advanced framework for loading, caching, processing, displaying and preheating images.
  • PassportScannerstars422 - Scan the MRZ code of a passport and extract the first name, last name, passport number, nationality, date of birth, expiration date and personal number.
  • Roughstars84 - Rough lets you draw in a sketchy, hand-drawn-like, style.
  • Sharakustars1.5k - Image filtering UI library like Instagram.
  • Snowflakestars926 - Work with SVG.
  • SwiftGen-Assetsstars7.1k - A tool to auto-generate enums for all your UIImages from your Assets Catalogs.
  • SwiftGifstars1.3k - A small UIImage extension with GIF support.
  • SwiftSVGstars1.7k - A single pass SVG parser with multiple interface options (String, NS/UIBezierPath, CAShapeLayer, and NS/UIView).
  • SwiftWebImagestars37 - 🚀SwiftUI Image downloader with performant LRU mem/disk cache.
  • SwiftyGifstars1.4k - High performance GIF engine.
  • TinyCrayonstars1.7k - A smart and easy-to-use image masking and cutout SDK for mobile apps.
  • Toucanstars2.4k - Image processing api.
  • UIImageColorsstars2.9k - iTunes style color fetcher for UIImage.
  • Viewerstars513 - Image viewer (or Lightbox) with support for local and remote videos and images.
  • Vulcanstars290 - Multi image downloader with priority.
  • YPImagePickerstars3.4k - Instagram-like image picker & filters for iOS.
  • ZImageCropperstars181 - Crop image in any shape.

Key Value Coding

Libraries for key-value coding back to top

Keyboard

Do you want to create your own customized keyboard? Here are some interesting resources back to top

  • IHKeyboardAvoidingstars1.4k - An elegant solution for keeping any UIView visible when the keyboard is being shown. No UIScrollView required.
  • IQKeyboardManagerstars15k - Codeless drop-in universal library allows to prevent issues of keyboard sliding up and cover UITextField/UITextView.
  • KeyboardHideManagerstars57 - Codeless manager to hide keyboard by tapping on views for iOS.
  • KeyboardShortcutsstars563 - Add user-customizable global keyboard shortcuts to your macOS app. Includes a Cocoa and SwiftUI component.
  • Ribbonstars275 - 🎀 A simple cross-platform toolbar/custom input accessory view library for iOS & macOS.
  • Typiststars1k - Small, drop-in UIKit keyboard manager for iOS apps-helps manage keyboard's screen presence and behavior without notification center.

Kit

Libraries for coding with a simplified API back to top

  • BFKit-Swiftstars973 - A collection of useful classes, structs and extensions to develop Apps faster.
  • C4iOSstars957 - Harnesses the power of native iOS programming with a simplified API.

Layout

Libs to help you with layout. back to top

  • BrickKitstars614 - Create complex and responsive layouts in a simple way.
  • CGLayoutstars42 - Powerful autolayout framework, that can manage UIView(NSView), CALayer, not rendered views and etc. Provides placeholders.
  • FlexLayoutstars1.4k - Nice and clean interface to the highly optimized Facebook yoga Flexbox implementation.
  • Gridstars794 - The most powerful Grid container missed in SwiftUI.
  • LayoutKitstars3.2k - LayoutKit is a fast view layout library for iOS, macOS, and tvOS.
  • LayoutLessstars415 - Write less UI Code.
  • Neonstars4.6k - A powerful programmatic UI layout framework.
  • PinLayoutstars1.7k - Fast Views layouting without auto layout. No magic, pure code, full control and blazing fast. Concise syntax, intuitive, readable & chainable. [iOS/macOS/tvOS]
  • Staticstars1.2k - A simple static table views for iOS.
  • Steviastars3.1k - Elegant view layout for iOS.

Auto Layout

Bored of using storyboard? Give a try to declarative auto layout libs. back to top

  • Bamboostars76 - Auto Layout (and manual layout) in one line.
  • Cartographystars7.2k - Declarative auto layout lib for your project.
  • Cassowarystars105 - A linear constraint solving library using the same algorithm as AutoLayout.
  • Cupcakestars274 - An easy way to create and layout UI components for iOS.
  • DeviceLayoutstars170 - AutoLayout can be set differently for each device.
  • EasyPeasystars1.8k - Auto Layout made easy.
  • EasySwiftLayoutstars346 - Lightweight Swift framework for Apple's Auto-Layout.
  • EZLayoutstars22 - An easier and faster way to code Autolayout.
  • KVConstraintKitstars92 - An Impressive Autolayout DSL for iOS, tvOS & OSX.
  • MisterFusionstars314 - DSL for AutoLayout, supports Size Class.
  • Mortarstars82 - A concise but flexible DSL for creating Auto Layout constraints and adding subviews.
  • NorthLayoutstars33 - Fast path to layout using Visual Format Language (VFL) with extended syntax.
  • PureLayoutstars7.5k - The ultimate API for iOS & OS X Auto Layout.
  • SnapKitstars17.5k - Autolayout DSL for iOS & OS X.
  • Swiftstraintsstars118 - Powerful auto-layout framework that lets you write constraints in one line of code.
  • TinyConstraintsstars3.6k - TinyConstraints is the syntactic sugar that makes Auto Layout sweeter for human use.

Localization

Frameworks that helps with localizing your app back to top

  • BartyCrouchstars1k - Incrementally update/translate your Strings files from Code and Storyboards/XIBs.
  • CrowdinSDKstars39 - Delivers all new translations from Crowdin project to the application immediately.
  • IBLocalizablestars463 - Localize your views directly in Interface Builder with IBLocalizable.
  • L10n-swiftstars194 - Localization of an application with ability to change language "on the fly" and support for plural forms in any language.
  • LocalizationKitstars1.2k - Realtime dynamic localization of your app with remote management so you can manage maintain and deploy translations without resubmitting app.
  • Localizestars258 - Localize apps using e.g. regular expressions in Localizable.strings.
  • Localize-Swiftstars2.6k - Localize apps using e.g. regular expressions in Localizable.strings.
  • NoOptionalInterpolationstars49 - Get rid of "Optional(...)" and "nil" in string interpolation. Easy pluralization.
  • SwiftGen-L10nstars7.1k - A tool to auto-generate enums for all your Localizable.strings keys (with appropriate associated values if those strings contains printf-format placeholders like %@).
  • Translatiostars18 - Super lightweight library that helps you to localize strings, even directly in storyboards.

back to top

  • STLocationRequeststars638 - An elegant and simple 3D Flyover Location Request Screen.

Logging

Utilities for writing to and reading from the device log back to top

  • AEConsolestars132 - Customizable Console UI overlay with debug log on top of your iOS App.
  • CleanroomLoggerstars1.3k - Configurable and extensible high-level logging API that is simple, lightweight and performant.
  • Durationstars324 - Lightweight logging library focused on reporting timings for operations.
  • Gedatsustars468 - Provide readable format about AutoLayout error console log.
  • HeliumLoggerstars169 - IBM's lightweight logging framework.
  • Printerstars62 - A fancy logger for your next app.
  • Puppystars33 - A flexible logging library that supports multiple transports and platforms.
  • Pureestars149 - A log collector for iOS.
  • QorumLogsstars779 - Logging Utility for Xcode & Google Docs.
  • Rainbowstars1.5k - Delightful console output.
  • SwiftyBeaverstars5.2k - Multi-platform logging during development & release.
  • TinyConsolestars1.9k - A tiny log console to display information while using your iOS app.
  • TraceLogstars49 - Dead Simple: logging the way it's meant to be! Runs on iOS, macOS, and Linux.
  • Watchdogstars1.8k - Utility for logging excessive blocking on the main thread.
  • WatchdogInspectorstars498 - A logging tool to show the current framerate (fps) in the status bar of your iOS app.
  • Willowstars1.3k - Willow is a powerful, yet lightweight logging library.
  • XCGLoggerstars3.6k - Full featured & Configurable logging utility with log levels, timestamps, and line numbers.

Maps

back to top

  • Clusterstars1.1k - Easy Map Annotation Clustering.

  • LocoKitstars1.4k - A location and activity recording framework for iOS.

Network

A list of libs that allow you to decrease the amount of time spent dealing with http requests. back to top

  • Alamofirestars35.7k - Elegant networking.
  • APIKitstars1.8k - Library for building type-safe web API client.
  • Ciaostars43 - Publish and discover services using mDNS (Bonjour, Zeroconf).
  • CodyFirestars230 - Powerful Codable API requests builder and manager for iOS. Based on Alamofire.
  • Conduitstars48 - Robust networking for web APIs.
  • Connectivitystars1.4k - 🌐 Makes Internet connectivity detection more robust by detecting Wi-Fi networks without Internet access.
  • Dotsstars33 - Lightweight Concurrent Networking Framework.
  • Dratinistars36 - A neat network layer.
  • Heimdallr.swiftstars607 - Easy to use OAuth 2 library for iOS.
  • Juststars1.3k - HTTP for Humans (a python-requests style HTTP library).
  • Malibustars7 - A networking library built on promises.
  • Moyastars13k - Network abstraction layer.
  • MultiPeerstars172 - A wrapper for the MultipeerConnectivity framework for automatic offline data transmission between devices.
  • NEKitstars2.8k - A toolkit for Network Extension Framework.
  • NetClientstars119 - Versatile HTTP networking library.
  • Netfoxstars3.1k - A lightweight, one line setup, network debugging library.
  • Netswiftstars20 - A type-safe, high-level networking solution.
  • OAuth2stars1k - oauth2 auth lib.
  • OAuthSwiftstars2.8k - OAuth library for iOS.
  • Pitayastars848 - HTTP / HTTPS networking library just incidentally execute on machines.
  • PMHTTPstars508 - HTTP framework with a focus on REST and JSON.
  • Postalstars605 - Framework providing simple access to common email providers.
  • Reachability.swiftstars7.2k - A replacement for Apple's Reachability with closures.
  • ReactiveAPIstars75 - Write clean, concise and declarative network code relying on URLSession, with the power of RxSwift. Inspired by Retrofit.
  • ResponseDetectivestars1.9k - A non-intrusive framework for intercepting any outgoing requests and incoming responses between your app and server for debugging purposes.
  • ShadowsocksX-NGstars29.4k - A fast tunnel proxy that helps you bypass firewalls.
  • Siesta - Elegant abstraction for REST APIs that untangles stateful messes. An alternative to callback- and delegate-based networking.
  • SolarNetworkstars99 - Elegant network abstraction layer.
  • SwiftHTTPstars1.8k - NSURLSession wrapper.
  • SwiftyOAuthstars477 - A small OAuth library with a built-in set of providers.
  • TermiNetworkstars67 - 🌏 A zero-dependency networking solution for building modern and secure iOS, watchOS, macOS and tvOS applications.
  • TRONstars509 - Lightweight network abstraction layer, written on top of Alamofire.
  • Wormholystars1.9k - iOS network debugging, like a wizard 🧙‍.

HTML

Need to manipulate contents from html easily? back to top

  • Fuzistars909 - A fast & lightweight XML/HTML parser with XPath & CSS support.
  • Jistars823 - XML/HTML parser.
  • Kannastars2.1k - Another XML/HTML parser.
  • SwiftSoupstars2.8k - HTML Parser, with best of DOM, CSS, and jquery.
  • WKZombiestars1.1k - Headless browser.

Messaging Protocol

back to top

  • CocoaMQTTstars1.1k - MQTT for iOS and OS X.
  • Perfect-Notificationsstars105 - iOS Notifications for Linux and OS X.

Socket

back to top

  • BlueSocketstars1.2k - IBM's cross platform low level socket framework.
  • BlueSSLServicestars80 - SSL/TLS add-in for IBM's low level socket framework.
  • DNWebSocketstars29 - Object-Oriented, Autobahn tested WebSocket Library (RFC 6455).
  • RxWebSocketstars53 - Reactive WebSockets.
  • Socket.IOstars4.5k - Socket.IO client for iOS/OS X.
  • socketsstars560 - TCP, UDP; Client, Server; Linux, OS X.
  • Starscreamstars6.8k - Websockets for iOS and OSX.
  • SwiftDSSocketstars61 - Asynchronous socket framework built atop DispatchSource.
  • SwiftSocketstars1.4k - Simple TCP socket library.
  • SwiftWebSocketstars1.5k - A high performance WebSocket client library .

Webserver

Would you like host a webserver in your device? Here you can find how to do it. back to top

  • Ambassadorstars155 - Super lightweight web framework based on SWSGI.
  • Corvusstars38 - Web framework to build REST APIs with a declarative syntax.
  • Curassowstars396 - HTTP server using the pre-fork worker model.
  • Embassystars457 - Super lightweight async HTTP server library.
  • Kiturastars7.5k - IBM's web framework and server for web services.
  • Lightningstars312 - Multiplatform Single-threaded Non-blocking Web and Networking Framework.
  • Noze.iostars299 - Evented I/O streams like Node.js.
  • Perfectstars13.9k - Server-side Swift. The Perfect library, application server, connectors and example apps.
  • swifterstars3.2k - Http server with routing handler.
  • Vaporstars20.3k - Elegant web framework that works on iOS, OS X, and Ubuntu.
  • Zewostars1.9k - Server-Side Swift.

OCR

back to top

  • SwiftOCRstars4.4k - Neural Network based OCR lib.

Optimization

back to top

PDF

back to top

  • PDFGeneratorstars638 - A simple Generator of PDF. Generate PDF from view(s) or image(s).
  • SimplePDFstars215 - Create a simple PDF effortlessly.
  • UXMPDFKitstars263 - A PDF viewer and annotator that can be embedded in iOS applications.

Quality

back to top

  • AnyLintstars100 - Lint anything by combining the power of Swift & regular expressions.
  • IBLinterstars916 - A linter tool for Interface Builder.
  • swift-modstars66 - A tool for Swift code modification intermediating between code generation and formatting.
  • SwiftCopstars543 - A validation library which inspired by the clarity of Ruby On Rails Active Record validations.
  • SwiftFormatstars4.7k - A code library and command-line formatting tool for reformatting Swift code.
  • SwiftLintstars14.7k - A tool to enforce coding conventions.
  • Swimatstars1.4k - Xcode plugin to format code.
  • Tailorstars1.4k - Cross-platform static analyzer that helps you to write cleaner code and avoid bugs.

Scripting

back to top

  • Marathonstars1.9k - Easy way to create and manage scripts.
  • Swift for Scriptingstars151 - A hand-curated collection of useful and informative scripting material.

SDK

back to top

Security

back to top

  • SecurePropertyStoragestars387 - Helps you define secure storages for your properties using Swift property wrappers.

Cryptography

Deal with cryptography method easily back to top

  • BlueCryptorstars172 - IBM's Cross Platform Crypto library.
  • BlueRSAstars100 - IBM's Cross Platform RSA Crypto library.
  • CryptoSwiftstars8.5k - Crypto related functions and helpers.
  • IDZSwiftCommonCryptostars451 - A wrapper for Apple's Common Crypto library.
  • JOSESwiftstars119 - A framework for the JOSE standards JWS, JWE, and JWK.
  • RNCryptorstars3.3k - CCCryptor (Apple's AES encryption) wrappers for iOS and Mac.
  • SCryptostars35 - Elegant interface to access the CommonCrypto routines.
  • Siphashstars253 - Simple and secure hashing with the SipHash algorithm.
  • Swift-Sodiumstars404 - Interface to the Sodium library for common crypto operations for iOS and OS X.
  • Themisstars1.3k - Multilanguage framework for making typical encryption schemes easy to use: data at rest, authenticated data exchange, transport protection, authentication, and so on.

Keychain

back to top

  • keychain-swiftstars2k - Helper functions for saving text in Keychain securely for iOS, OS X, tvOS and watchOS.
  • KeychainAccessstars6.3k - Simple wrapper for Keychain that works on iOS and OS X.
  • Latchstars56 - A simple Keychain Wrapper for iOS.
  • SwiftKeychainWrapperstars1.3k - Simple static wrapper for the iOS Keychain to allow you to use it in a similar fashion to user defaults.

Streaming

back to top

  • HaishinKitstars2.1k - Camera and Microphone streaming library via RTMP, HLS for iOS, macOS, tvOS.
  • Livestars2.4k - Demonstrate how to build a live broadcast app.

Styling

back to top

  • Ambiencestars459 - Brightness aware accessibility theme switching without coding.
  • Styliststars264 - Define UI styles in a hot-loadable external yaml or json file.
  • SwiftThemestars2.1k - Powerful theme/skin manager for iOS 8+.
  • Themesstars216 - Theme management.

System

back to top

  • BlueSignalsstars80 - IBM's Cross Platform OS signal handling library.
  • LaunchAtLoginstars879 - Easily add 'Launch at Login' functionality to your sandboxed macOS app.
  • SystemKitstars284 - OS X system library.

Testing

A collection of testing frameworks. back to top

  • DVRstars639 - A simple network testing framework.
  • Erikstars447 - An headless browser to access and manipulate webpages using javascript allowing to run functional tests.
  • Fakerystars1.5k - Fake data generator.
  • Nimblestars4.1k - A matcher framework.
  • OHHTTPStubsstars4.7k - A testing library designed to stub your network requests easily.
  • PinpointKitstars1.1k - Lets your testers and users send feedback with annotated screenshots and logs using a simple gesture.
  • Quickstars9.1k - Quick is a behavior-driven development framework.
  • Sizesstars1.2k - Test your app on different device and font sizes.
  • SnapshotTeststars42 - Snapshot testing tool for iOS and tvOS.
  • Spectrestars367 - BDD Framework.
  • SwiftCheckstars1.3k - A testing library that automatically generates random data for testing program properties.
  • UI Testing Cheat Sheetstars2k - Answers to common "How do I test this with UI Testing?" questions with a working example app.
  • XCTeststars896 - The XCTest Project, A Swift core library for providing unit test support.

Mock

back to top

  • AutoMockablestars37 - A framework that leverages the type system to let you easily create mocked instances of your data types.
  • Cuckoostars1.4k - First boilerplate-free mocking framework.
  • Mockerstars545 - Mock Alamofire and URLSession requests without touching your code implementation
  • Mockingbirdstars152 - Simplify software testing, by easily mocking any system using HTTP/HTTPS, allowing a team to test and develop against a service that is not complete, unstable or just to reproduce planned cases.
  • Mockingjaystars1.4k - An elegant library for stubbing HTTP requests with ease.
  • Mockitstars110 - A simple mocking framework, inspired by the famous Mockito for Java.
  • MockSwiftstars58 - Mock Framework that uses the power of property wrappers.

Text

A collection of text projects. back to top

  • Attributedstars732 - Modern µframework for attributed strings.
  • AttributedTextViewstars405 - Easiest way to create an attributed UITextView with support for multiple links, hashtags and mentions.
  • BonMotstars3k - Beautiful, easy attributed strings for iOS.
  • Crocstars124 - A lightweight Emoji parsing and querying library.
  • edhitastars1.2k - Fully open source text editor for iOS.
  • MarkdownKitstars593 - A simple and customizable Markdown Parser.
  • MarkdownViewstars1.6k - iOS Markdown view.
  • MarkyMarkstars250 - Converts Markdown into native views or attributed strings.
  • Notepadstars710 - A fully themeable markdown editor with live syntax highlighting.
  • OEMentionsstars43 - An easy way to add mentions to uitextview like Facebook and Instagram.
  • Parseystars52 - Parser combinator framework that supports source location tracking, backtracking prevention, and rich error messages.
  • Pluralize.swiftstars181 - Great String Pluralize Extension.
  • PredicateFlowstars99 - PredicateFlow is a builder that allows you to write amazing, strong-typed and easy-to-read NSPredicate.
  • PrediKitstars542 - An NSPredicate DSL for iOS & OS X inspired by SnapKit.
  • PySwiftyRegexstars227 - Easily deal with Regex in a Pythonic way.
  • Regex by crossroadlabsstars309 - Very easy to use Regular Expressions library with rich functionality. Features both operator =~ and method based APIs. Unit tests covered.
  • RichEditorViewstars1.7k - RichEditorView is a simple, modular, drop-in UIView subclass for Rich Text Editing.
  • Sprinterstars163 - A library for formatting strings.
  • SwiftRichStringstars2.6k - Elegant & Painless Attributed Strings Management Library.
  • SwiftVerbalExpressionsstars579 - VerbalExpressions porting.
  • SwiftyAttributesstars1.3k - Extensions that make it a breeze to work with attributed strings.
  • Taggingstars91 - A TextView that provides easy to use tagging feature for Mention or Hashtag.
  • Texstylestars71 - Texstyle allows you to format attributed strings easily.
  • TextAttributesstars2.2k - An easier way to compose attributed strings.
  • TextBuilderstars141 - Like a SwiftUI ViewBuilder, but for Text.
  • TwitterTextEditorstars2.5k - A standalone, flexible API that provides a full featured rich text editor for iOS applications.
  • VEditorKitstars443 - Lightweight and Powerful Editor Kit.

Thread

Threading, task-based or asynchronous programming, Grand Central Dispatch (GCD) wrapper back to top

  • Asyncstars4.6k - Syntactic sugar for Grand Central Dispatch.
  • AwaitKitstars711 - The ES7 Async/Await control flow.
  • Eachstars764 - Each is a NSTimer bridge library.
  • GCDTimerstars179 - A well-tested GCD timer.
  • Schedulestars1.7k - A missing lightweight task scheduler with an incredibly human-friendly syntax.
  • SwiftyTimerstars1.2k - API for NSTimer.

UI

A collection of pre-packaged transitions & cool ui stuffs. back to top

  • ActivityIndicatorViewstars503 - A number of preset loading indicators created with SwiftUI.
  • AECoreDataUIstars306 - Core Data driven UI.
  • AGCircularPickerstars592 - Helpful component for creating a controller aimed to manage any calculated parameter.
  • AMScrollingNavbarstars6k - Scrollable UINavigationBar that follows the scrolling of a UIScrollView.
  • Aralestars39 - A custom stretchable header view for UIScrollView or any its subclasses with UIActivityIndicatorView support for content reloading.
  • BadgeHubstars604 - Make any UIView a full fledged animated notification center. It is a way to quickly add a notification badge icon to a UIView.
  • BatteryViewstars45 - Simple battery shaped UIView.
  • BetterSafariViewstars131 - A better way to present a SFSafariViewController or start a ASWebAuthenticationSession in SwiftUI.
  • BreakOutToRefreshstars2.5k - A playable pull to refresh view using SpriteKit.
  • BulletinBoardstars5k - Generates and manages contextual cards displayed at the bottom of the screen.
  • CircularProgressstars383 - Circular progress indicator for your macOS app.
  • ClassicKitstars2.2k - A collection of classic-style UI components.
  • ContainerControllerstars288 - UI Component. This is a copy swipe-panel from app: Apple Maps, Stocks
  • CostumeKitstars299 - Base types for theming an app.
  • CountryPickerViewstars404 - A simple, customizable view for efficiently collecting country information in iOS apps.
  • CustomSeguestars121 - Custom segue for OSX Storyboards with slide and cross fade effects.
  • DeckTransitionstars2.2k - A library to recreate the iOS 10 Apple Music now playing transition.
  • DockProgressstars817 - Show progress in your macOS app's Dock icon.
  • Dodostars870 - A message bar for iOS.
  • Doric Design System Foundationstars79 - Protocol oriented, type safe, scalable design system foundation framework for iOS.
  • DropDownstars2k - A Material Design drop down for iOS.
  • Elementstars857 - Programmatic UI framework for macOS.
  • Elissastars166 - Displays a notification on top of a UITabBarItem or any UIView anchor view to reveal additional information.
  • EstMusicIndicatorstars448 - Music play indicator like iTunes.
  • Familystars236 - A child view controller framework that makes setting up your parent controllers as easy as pie.
  • FAQViewstars463 - An easy to use FAQ view for iOS.
  • Fashionstars99 - Fashion accessories and beauty tools to share and reuse UI styles.
  • FlagKitstars2.7k - Beautiful flag icons for usage in apps and on the web.
  • FlexibleHeaderstars60 - A container view that responds to scrolling of UIScrollView.
  • FloatRatingViewstars529 - Floating rating system.
  • Fluid Sliderstars1.7k - A slider widget with a popup bubble displaying the precise value selected.
  • GaugeKitstars996 - Customizable gauges. Easy reproduce Apple's style gauges.
  • Geometrystars89 - extensions for UIView.
  • GMStepperstars861 - A stepper with a sliding label in the middle.
  • GradientProgressBarstars327 - An animated gradient progress bar.
  • GRMustachestars537 - Flexible Mustache templates.
  • GrowingTextViewstars692 - UITextView that supports auto growing, placeholder and length limit.
  • Hexaconstars331 - A new way to display content in your app like the Apple Watch SpringBoard.
  • HGCircularSliderstars2.1k - A custom reusable circular slider control for iOS application.
  • HidesNavigationBarWhenPushedstars53 - A library, which adds the ability to hide navigation bar when view controller is pushed via hidesNavigationBarWhenPushed flag.
  • HorizontalDialstars201 - A horizontal scroll dial like Instagram.
  • IGColorPickerstars242 - A customizable color picker for iOS.
  • InfoViewstars57 - Simple information view with pointed arrow.
  • InstantSearch iOSstars505 - A library of widgets and helpers to build instant-search features on iOS.
  • KALoaderstars100 - Beautiful animated placeholders for showing loading of data.
  • KDInteractiveNavigationControllerstars153 - A UINavigationController subclass that support pop interactive UINavigationBar with hidden or show.
  • KMNavigationBarTransitionstars3.2k - A drop-in universal library helps you to manage the navigation bar styles and makes transition animations smooth between different navigation bar styles while pushing or popping a view controller for all orientations.
  • KMPlaceholderTextViewstars718 - A UITextView subclass that adds support for multiline placeholder.
  • LeeGostars967 - Declarative, configurable & highly reusable UI development as making Lego bricks.
  • LicensePliststars1.9k - A command-line tool that automatically generates a Plist of all your dependencies.
  • LiquidLoaderstars1.3k - Spinner loader components with liquid animation.
  • LoadingShimmerstars1.2k - An easy way to add a shimmering effect to any view with just one line of code. It is useful as an unobtrusive loading indicator.
  • Macawstars5.6k - Powerful and easy-to-use vector graphics library with SVG support.
  • Magneticstars1.3k - SpriteKit Floating Bubble Picker (inspired by Apple Music).
  • Mandolinestars874 - An iOS picker view to serve all your 'picking' needs.
  • MantleModalstars90 - A simple modal resource that uses a UIScrollView to allow the user to close the modal by dragging it down.
  • Materialstars11.8k - Express your creativity with Material, an animation and graphics framework for Google's Material Design and Apple's Flat UI.
  • Material Components for iOSstars4.3k - Modular and customizable Material Design UI components.
  • MaterialKitstars2.5k - Material design components.
  • MediaBrowserstars589 - Simple iOS photo and video browser with optional grid view, captions and selections.
  • MediumScrollFullScreenstars551 - Medium scroll style menubar.
  • MPParallaxViewstars1.7k - Apple TV Parallax effect.
  • MultiSelectSegmentedControlstars194 - UISegmentedControl remake that supports selecting multiple segments, vertical stacking, combining text and images.
  • MultiSliderstars198 - UISlider clone with multiple thumbs and values, range highlight, optional snap intervals, optional value labels, either vertical or horizontal.
  • MXParallaxHeaderstars1.6k - Simple parallax header for UIScrollView.
  • MZFormSheetPresentationControllerstars975 - Provides an alternative to the native iOS UIModalPresentationFormSheet, adding support for iPhone and additional opportunities to setup controller size and feel form sheet.
  • NeumorphismKitstars34 - Neumorphism framework for UIKit.
  • NextGrowingTextViewstars1.4k - The next in the generations of 'growing textviews' optimized for iOS 7 and above.
  • NVActivityIndicatorViewstars9.8k - Collection of nice loading animations.
  • OverlayContainerstars818 - OverlayContainer makes it easier to develop overlay based interfaces, such as the one presented in the Apple Maps or Stocks apps.
  • Partition Kitstars202 - A SwiftUI Library for creating resizable partitions for View Content.
  • PPAssetsActionControllerstars70 - Highly customizable Action Sheet Controller with assets preview.
  • Preferencesstars929 - Add a preferences window to your macOS app in minutes.
  • PullToDismissstars464 - You can dismiss modal viewcontroller by pulling scrollview or navigationbar.
  • RangeSeekSliderstars530 - A customizable range slider like a UISlider for iOS.
  • Reel searchstars2.5k - Option list managed as a reel.
  • ResizingTokenFieldstars91 - A UICollectionView-based token field which provides intrinsic content height.
  • RetroProgressstars12 - Retro looking progress bar straight from the 90s.
  • SAHistoryNavigationViewControllerstars1.6k - iOS task manager like UI in UINavigationContoller.
  • SectionedSliderstars337 - Control Center Slider.
  • SelectionDialogstars115 - Simple selection dialog.
  • ShadowViewstars391 - Make shadows management easy on UIView.
  • Shinystars707 - Iridescent Effect View (inspired by Apple Pay Cash).
  • ShowSomeProgressstars92 - Animated Progress and Activity Indicators for iOS apps.
  • SkeletonViewstars10.1k - An elegant way to show users that something is happening and also prepare them to which contents he is waiting.
  • SKPhotoBrowserstars2.2k - Simple PhotoBrowser/Viewer inspired by facebook, twitter photo browsers.
  • Spots - Spots is a view controller framework that makes your setup and future development blazingly fast.
  • SpreadsheetViewstars12 - Full configurable spreadsheet view user interfaces for iOS applications.
  • StarryStarsstars175 - Display & edit ratings, fully customizable from interface builder.
  • StatefulViewControllerstars2.1k - Placeholder views based on content, loading, error or empty states.
  • StepProgressViewstars274 - Step-by-step progress view with labels and shapes. A good replacement for UIActivityIndicatorView and UIProgressView.
  • Streamojistars219 - Custom emoji rendering library with support for GIFs and images, UITextView extension.
  • SweetCurtainstars110 - Really sweet and easy bottom pullable sheet implementation. You can find a similar implementation in applications like Apple Maps, Find My, Stocks, etc.
  • SwiftyUIstars335 - High performance and lightweight UIView, UIImage, UIImageView, UIlabel, UIButton and more.
  • TagListViewstars2.2k - Simple but highly customizable iOS tag list view.
  • Toasterstars1.4k - Notification toasts.
  • TouchVisualizerstars800 - Lightweight touch visualization library with a single line of code.
  • Twinklestars570 - Easy way to make elements in your iOS app twinkle.
  • TZSignalBarStrengthstars21 - TZSignalStrengthView is an easy to use UI component to help display a signal bar with an added customizable fill animation.
  • UIPheonixstars28 - Easy, flexible, dynamic and highly scalable UI framework + concept for reusable component/control-driven apps.
  • UltraDrawerViewstars135 - Lightweight, fast and customizable Drawer View implementation identical to Apple Maps, Stocks and etc.
  • URLEmbeddedViewstars634 - Automatically caches the object that is confirmed the Open Graph Protocol, and displays it as URL embedded card.
  • Walletstars354 - A replica of the Apple's Wallet interface. Add, delete or present your cards and passes.
  • Windlessstars920 - Windless makes it easy to implement invisible layout loading view.
  • WSTagsFieldstars1k - An iOS text field that represents different Tags.
  • YMTreeMapstars70 - Treemap / Heatmap layout engine, based on Squarified.
  • YNSearchstars1.1k - Awesome fully customizable search view like Pinterest.

Alert

Libs to display alert, action sheet, notification, popup. back to top

  • Alertiftstars257 - Modern, easy UIAlertController wrapper.
  • Alerts Pickersstars5.1k - Advanced usage of UIAlertController with TextField, DatePicker, PickerView, TableView and CollectionView.
  • ALRTstars95 - An easier constructor for UIAlertController. Present an alert from anywhere.
  • AwaitToaststars129 - 🍞 An async waiting toast with basic toast. Inspired by facebook posting toast.
  • CDAlertViewstars1.1k - Highly customizable alert/notification/success/error/alarm popup.
  • CFNotifystars490 - A customizable framework to create draggable alert views.
  • EZAlertControllerstars370 - Easy UIAlertController.
  • GSMessagestars614 - A simple style messages/notifications for iOS 7+.
  • Hokusaistars431 - A library for a cool bouncy action sheet.
  • Kamagaristars76 - Simple UIAlertController builder class.
  • KRAlertControllerstars53 - A beautiful alert controller for your iOS.
  • Loafstars833 - A simple framework for easy iOS Toasts.
  • NotificationBannerstars4.1k - The easiest way to display highly customizable in app notification banners in iOS.
  • PMAlertControllerstars2.3k - PMAlertController is a great and customizable substitute to UIAlertController.
  • PopupDialogstars3.6k - A simple, customizable popup dialog. Replaces UIAlertController alert style.
  • PopupViewstars729 - Toasts and popups library written with SwiftUI.
  • SCLAlertViewstars5.1k - Animated Alert view.
  • Sheetstars268 - Actionsheet with navigation features such as the Flipboard App.
  • SPAlertstars1.1k - Native popup from Apple Music & Feedback in AppStore. Contains Done & Heart presets.
  • StatusAlertstars818 - Display Apple system-like self-hiding status alerts without interrupting user flow.
  • SweetAlertstars2k - Alert system.
  • Swift-Promptsstars746 - Design custom prompts with a great scope of options to choose from.
  • SwiftEntryKitstars5.4k - A simple and versatile pop-up presenter.
  • SwiftMessagesstars6.1k - A very flexible message bar for iOS.
  • SwiftOverlaysstars623 - various popups and notifications.
  • SwiftyDropstars692 - Lightweight dropdown message bar.
  • XLActionControllerstars3.2k - Fully customizable and extensible action sheet controller.

back to top

  • AHDownloadButtonstars372 - Customizable download button with progress and transition animations. It is based on Apple's App Store download button.

  • FloatingButtonstars332 - Easily customizable floating button menu created with SwiftUI.

  • NFDownloadButtonstars428 - Revamped Download Button. It's kinda a reverse engineering of Netflix's app download button.

back to top

  • CalendarKitstars1.8k - Fully customizable calendar day view.
