back to top

  • ActiveLabelstars3.7k - UILabel drop-in replacement supporting Hashtags (#), Mentions (@) and URLs (http://).
  • Atributikastars945 - TConvert text with HTML tags, links, hashtags, mentions into NSAttributedString. Make them clickable with UILabel drop-in replacement.
  • CountdownLabelstars754 - Simple countdown UILabel with morphing animation, and some useful function.
  • GlitchLabelstars989 - Glitching UILabel for iOS.
  • IncrementableLabelstars77 - An UILabel subclass to (de)increment numbers in an UILabel.
  • KDEDateLabelstars112 - An UILabel subclass that updates itself to make time ago's format easier.
  • LTMorphingLabelstars7.5k - Graceful morphing effects for UILabel.
  • Nantesstars943 - TTTAttributedLabel replacement.
  • NumberMorphViewstars1.6k - A label view for displaying numbers which can transition or animate using a technique called number tweening or number morphing.
  • SMIconLabelstars92 - UILabel with image placed from left or right.
  • Translucidstars550 - Lightweight library to set an Image as text background.
  • TriLabelViewstars158 - A triangle shaped corner label view for iOS.

Menu

back to top

  • AKSwiftSlideMenustars281 - Slide Menu (Drawer).
  • CircleMenustars3.3k - CircleMenu is a simple, elegant UI menu with a circular layout and material design animations.
  • ENSwiftSideMenustars1.8k - Sliding side menu.
  • FanMenustars629 - Menu with a circular layout based on Macaw.
  • FlowingMenustars950 - Interactive view transition to display menus with flowing and bouncing effects.
  • GuillotineMenustars2.9k - Guillotine style menu.
  • HHFloatingViewstars93 - An easy to use and setup floating view for your app.
  • InteractiveSideMenustars684 - Customizable iOS Interactive Side Menu.
  • KWDrawerControllerstars154 - Drawer view controller that easy to use.
  • MediumMenustars322 - A menu based on Medium iOS app.
  • MenuItemKitstars795 - UIMenuItem with image and block (closure) support.
  • Pagemenustars5.2k - Pagination enabled view controller.
  • PagingKitstars1.1k - PagingKit provides customizable menu UI.
  • Panelsstars1.4k - Panels is a framework to easily add sliding panels to your application.
  • Parchmentstars2.6k - A paging view controller with a highly customizable menu, built on UICollectionView.
  • PopMenustars1.2k - 😎 A cool and customizable popup style action sheet for iOS.
  • SideMenustars5.1k - Simple side menu control for iOS inspired by Facebook. Right and Left sides. No coding required.
  • SlideMenuControllerSwiftstars3.3k - iOS Slide Menu View based on Google+, iQON, Feedly, Ameba iOS app.
  • SwipeMenuViewControllerstars949 - Swipable tab and menu View and ViewController.
  • XLPagerTabStripstars6.5k - Android PagerTabStrip for iOS.
  • YNDropDownMenustars1.3k - Adorable iOS drop down menu.

Pagination

back to top

  • CHIPageControlstars2.8k - A set of cool animated page controls to replace boring UIPageControl.
  • FlexiblePageControlstars664 - A flexible UIPageControl like Instagram.
  • iPagesstars123 - Quickly implement swipable page views in SwiftUI 📝.
  • Pageboystars1.6k - A simple, highly informative page view controller.
  • PageControllerstars359 - Infinite paging controller.
  • SlideControllerstars288 - It is a nice alternative for UIPageViewController built using power of generic types. Swipe between pages with an interactive title navigation control. Configure horizontal or vertical chains for unlimited pages amount.

Payment

back to top

  • AnimatedCardInputstars27 - Customisable and easy to use Credit Card UI.
  • Caishenstars752 - A Payment Card UI & Validator for iOS.
  • iCardstars324 - Bank Card Generator using SnapKit DSL.
  • MFCardstars357 - Easily integrate Credit Card payments in iOS App.
  • TPInAppReceiptstars335 - A lightweight, pure-Swift library for reading and validating Apple In App Purchase Receipt locally.

Permissions

back to top

  • AREKstars950 - AREK is a clean and easy to use wrapper over any kind of iOS permission.
  • Permissionstars2.8k - A unified API to ask for permissions on iOS.
  • SPPermissionstars4.3k - Simple request permission with native UI and interactive animation.

StackView

back to top

  • StackViewControllerstars844 - Simplify the use of UIStackView.
  • TZStackViewstars1.2k - An iOS9 UIStackView layout component re-implemented for iOS 7 and 8.

Switch

back to top

  • MJMaterialSwitchstars57 - A Customizable Switch UI for iOS, Inspired from Google's Material Design.
  • paper-switchstars2.8k - RAMPaperSwitch is a material design UI module which paints over the parent view when the switch is turned on.
  • Switchstars132 - A switch control with full Interface Builder support.

Tab

back to top

  • Adaptive Tab Barstars2k - Adaptive tab bar.
  • Animated Tab Barstars10.7k - RAMAnimatedTabBarController is a module for adding animation to tab bar items.
  • CircleBarstars541 - A fun, easy-to-use tab bar navigation controller for iOS.
  • ColorMatchTabsstars1.3k - Interesting way to display tabs.
  • DTPagerControllerstars245 - Container view controller to display a set of ViewControllers in a horizontal scroll view.
  • ESTabBarControllerstars4.5k - A highly customizable TabBarController component, which is inherited from UITabBarController.
  • HHTabBarViewstars125 - A lightweight customized tab bar view.
  • PolioPagerstars145 - A flexible TabBarController with search tab like SNKRS.
  • Tabmanstars2.1k - A powerful paging view controller with indicator bar.
  • TabPageViewControllerstars1.1k - Paging view controller and scroll tab view.

Template

back to top

  • Stencilstars2k - Simple and powerful template language.
  • SwiftCssParserstars268 - Extensible CSS parser.

TextField

back to top

  • CBPinEntryViewstars181 - Easy to use, very customisable pin entry.
  • CHIOTPFieldstars150 - A set of textfields that can be used for One-time passwords, SMS codes, PIN codes, etc.
  • DTTextFieldstars220 - DTTextField is a custom textfield with floating placeholder and error label.
  • FloatingLabelTextFieldSwiftUIstars153 - FloatingLabelTextFieldSwiftUI is a small and lightweight SwiftUI framework written in completely SwiftUI (not using UIViewRepresentable) that allows to create beautiful and customisable floating label textfield!
  • HTYTextFieldstars313 - A UITextField with bouncy placeholder.
  • iTextField ⌨️stars53 - A fully-wrapped UITextField that works entirely in SwiftUI 🦅.
  • PasswordTextFieldstars294 - A custom TextField with a switchable icon which shows or hides the password and enforces good password policies.
  • SkyFloatingLabelTextFieldstars3.8k - A beautiful and flexible text field control implementation of "Float Label Pattern".
  • StyledTextKitstars1.2k - Declarative building and fast rendering attributed string library.
  • TextFieldCounterstars425 - UITextField character counter with lovable UX.
  • TextFieldEffectsstars5.6k - Several ready to use effects for UITextFields.
  • UITextField-Navigationstars436 - UITextField-Navigation adds next, previous and done buttons to the keyboard for your UITextFields. Highly customizable.
  • VKPinCodeViewstars85 - Simple and elegant UI component for input PIN.

Transition

back to top

  • BubbleTransitionstars3.2k - Bubble transition in an easy way.
  • Cards XIstars4k - Awesome iOS 11 AppStore's Card Views.
  • EasyTransitionsstars1.5k - A simple way to create custom interactive UIViewController transitions.
  • Herostars20k - Elegant transition library for iOS.
  • ImageTransitionstars196 - ImageTransition is a library for smooth animation of images during transitions.
  • Jellystars2.2k - Jelly provides custom view controller transitions with just a few lines of code.
  • MusicPlayerTransitionstars626 - Custom interactive transition like Apple Music iOS App.
  • PanSlipstars94 - Use PanGesture to dismiss view on UIViewController and UIView.
  • PinterestSwiftstars1.8k - Pinterest style transition.
  • RevealingSplashViewstars1.2k - A Splash view that animates and reveals its content, inspired by the Twitter splash.
  • SamuraiTransitionstars270 - Swift based library providing a collection of ViewController transitions featuring a number of neat cutting animations.
  • SPLarkControllerstars740 - Custom transition between two controller. Translate to top.
  • SPStorkControllerstars2.4k - Now playing controller from Apple Music. Customisable height.
  • StarWars.iOSstars3.6k - Transition animation to crumble view-controller into tiny pieces.
  • Transitionstars2.5k - Easy interactive interruptible custom ViewController transitions.

3D

back to top

  • Insert3Dstars62 - The fastest 🚀 way to embed a 3D model.

UICollectionView

back to top

  • ASCollectionViewstars294 - Lightweight custom collection view inspired by Airbnb.
  • AZCollectionViewControllerstars91 - Easy way to integrate pagination with dummy views in CollectionView, make Instagram Discover withing minutes.
  • Blueprintsstars913 - A framework that is meant to make your life easier when working with collection view flow layouts.
  • BouncyLayoutstars3.9k - Collection view layout that makes your cells bounce.
  • CardsLayoutstars702 - Nice card-designed custom CollectionView layout.
  • CarLensCollectionViewLayoutstars484 - An easy-to-use Collection View Layout for card-like animation.
  • CenteredCollectionViewstars993 - A lightweight UICollectionViewLayout that pages and centers it's cells.
  • CheckmarkCollectionViewCellstars57 - UICollectionViewCell with checkbox when it isSelected and empty circle when not - like Photos.app 'Select' mode.
  • CollectionViewShelfLayoutstars369 - A UICollectionViewLayout subclass displays its items as rows of items similar to the App Store Feature tab without a nested UITableView/UICollectionView hack.
  • CollectionViewSlantedLayoutstars1.9k - UICollectionViewLayout to show slanted content.
  • Drag and Drop UICollectionViewstars481 - Dragging and Dropping data across multiple UICollectionViews.
  • FSPagerViewstars5.9k - Elegant Screen Slide Library. It is extremely helpful for making Banner View、Product Show、Welcome/Guide Pages、Screen/ViewController Sliders.
  • Gliding Collectionstars1.5k - Gliding Collection is a smooth, flowing, customizable decision for a UICollectionView Controller.
  • GravitySliderstars798 - Beautiful alternative to the standard UICollectionView flow layout.
  • ShelfView-iOSstars261 - iOS custom view to display books on shelf.
  • SimpleSourcestars91 - Easy and type-safe iOS table and collection views.
  • SwiftSpreadsheetstars600 - Fully customizable spreadsheet CollectionViewLayout.
  • TagCellLayoutstars264 - UICollectionView layout for Tags with Left, Center & Right alignments.
  • UICollectionViewSplitLayoutstars226 - UICollectionViewSplitLayout makes collection view more responsive.
  • VegaScrollstars2.6k - Lightweight animation flowlayout for UICollectionView.

UITableView

back to top

  • AZTableViewControllerstars72 - Elegant and easy way to integrate pagination with placeholder views.
  • CollapsibleTableSectionViewControllerstars322 - A library to support collapsible sections in a table view.
  • DGElasticPullToRefreshstars3.6k - Elastic pull to refresh.
  • DiffableDataSourcesstars610 - 💾 A library for backporting UITableView/UICollectionViewDiffableDataSource.
  • DTTableViewManagerstars425 - Protocol-oriented UITableView management, powered by generics and associated types.
  • ExpandableCellstars583 - Fully refactored YNExapnadableCell with more concise, bug free. Easiest usage of expandable & collapsible cell for iOS. You can customize expandable UITableViewCell whatever you like. ExpandableCell is made because insertRows and deleteRows is hard to use. Just inheirt ExpandableDelegate.
  • ExpyTableViewstars351 - Make your table view expandable just by implementing one method.
  • FDTextFieldTableViewCellstars22 - Adds a UITextField to the cell and places it correctly.
  • folding-cellstars9.9k - Folding cell transition.
  • GridViewstars775 - Can be customized as a time table, spreadsheet, paging and more.
  • HGPlaceholdersstars2k - Nice library to show placeholders and Empty States for any UITableView/UICollectionView in your project.
  • OKTableViewLiaisonstars83 - Framework to help you better manage UITableViews.
  • ParallaxHeaderstars817 - Simple way to add parallax header to UIScrollView/UITableView.
  • Perseistars3.4k - Animated top menu for UITableView / UICollectionView / UIScrollView.
  • PullToRefreshSwiftstars533 - PullToRefresh library.
  • QuickTableViewControllerstars428 - A simple way to create a UITableView for settings.
  • ReverseExtensionstars1.6k - UITableView extension that enables the insertion of cells the from bottom of a table view.
  • SectionScrubberstars188 - A component to quickly scroll between collection view sections.
  • SelectionListstars96 - Simple single-selection or multiple-selection checklist, based on UITableView.
  • Shoyustars277 - Easier way to represent the structure of UITableView.
  • SwiftyCommentsstars204 - Nested hierarchy of expandable/collapsible cells to easily build elegant discussion threads.
  • SwipeCellKitstars5.6k - Swipeable UITableViewCell based on the stock Mail.app.
  • WLEmptyStatestars305 - A component that lets you customize the view when the dataset of UITableView is empty.
  • YNExpandableCellstars449 - Awesome expandable, collapsible tableview cell for iOS.

Walkthrough

back to top

  • AwesomeSpotlightViewstars231 - Create tutorial or coach tour.
  • BWWalkthroughstars2.8k - A class to build custom walkthroughs for your iOS App.
  • ConcentricOnboardingstars627 - SwiftUI library for a walkthrough or onboarding flow with tap actions.
  • Geccostars7 - Spotlight view for iOS.
  • Instructionsstars4.6k - A library to create app walkthroughs and guided tours.
  • OnboardKitstars349 - Customisable user onboarding for your iOS app.
  • PaperOnboardingstars3.1k - PaperOnboarding is a material design UI slider.
  • SuggestionsKitstars53 - Library for educating users about features in app.
  • SwiftyOnboardstars963 - An iOS framework that allows developers to create beautiful onboarding experiences.
  • SwiftyWalkthroughstars298 - The easiest way to create a great walkthrough experience in your apps.

Utility

Some interesting utilities to help you in your projects back to top

  • AlexaSkillsKitstars162 - Develop custom Alexa Skills.
  • ApplyStyleKitstars191 - Elegantly, Apply style to UIKit using Method Chain.
  • Basisstars315 - Pure Declarative Programming.
  • Bowstars547 - Companion library for Typed Functional Programming.
  • Butterflystars413 - A lightweight library for integrating bug-report and feedback features with shake-motion event.
  • CallbackURLKitstars299 - Implementation of x-callback-url (Inter app communication).
  • Closuresstars1.7k - Swifty closures for UIKit and Foundation.
  • Codextendedstars1.3k - Extensions giving Codable API type inference super powers.
  • Currystars484 - Function currying.
  • DeepDiffstars1.9k - Fast diff library.
  • Delegatedstars674 - Closure-based delegation without memory leaks.
  • DifferenceKitstars2.8k - 💻 A fast and flexible O(n) difference algorithm framework.
  • Differificstars123 - A fast and convenient diffing framework.
  • Dollarstars4.2k - Similar to Lo-Dash or Underscore in Javascript.
  • DuctTapestars142 - 📦 KeyPath dynamicMemberLookup based syntax sugar for Swift.
  • EtherWalletKitstars99 - Ethereum Wallet Toolkit for iOS - You can implement Ethereum wallet without a server and blockchain knowledge.
  • ExceptionCatcherstars77 - Catch Objective-C exceptions.
  • EZSwiftExtensionsstars2.9k - How standard types and classes were supposed to work.
  • FluentQuerystars148 - Powerful and easy to use Query Builder.
  • FluxCapacitorstars126 - FluxCapacitor makes implementing Flux design pattern easily with protocols and typealias.
  • Focusstars196 - Optics library (includes Lens, Prisms, and Isos) that is inspired by Haskell's Lens library.
  • Highlighterstars910 - Highlight whatever you want! Highlighter will magically find UI objects such as UILabel, UITextView, UITexTfield, UIButton in your UITableViewCell or other Class.
  • LifetimeTrackerstars2.4k - Surface retain cycle / memory issues right as you develop your application.
  • Lumosstars119 - An easy-to-use API for Objective-C runtime functions.
  • ObjectiveKitstars849 - API for Objective C runtime functions.
  • OpenSourceControllerstars52 - The simplest way to display the librarie's licences used in your application.
  • Playbookstars843 - 📘A library for isolated developing UI components and automatically snapshots of them.
  • PrivacyFlash Prostars117 - Generate a privacy policy for your Swift iOS app from its code.
  • protobuf-swiftstars925 - ProtocolBuffers.
  • Prototope - Library of lightweight interfaces for prototyping, bridged to JS.
  • R.swiftstars8k - Tool to get strong typed, autocompleted resources like images, cells and segues.
  • RandomKitstars1.4k - Random data generation.
  • ReadabilityKitstars758 - Preview extractor for news, articles and full-texts.
  • ResourceKitstars91 - Enable autocomplete use resources.
  • Resultstars2.5k - Type modelling the success/failure of arbitrary operations.
  • Runesstars820 - Functional operators: flatMap, map, apply.
  • Solarstars424 - Calculate sunrise and sunset times given a location.
  • SpriteKit+Springstars224 - SpriteKit API reproducing UIView's spring animations with SKAction.
  • Sugarstars1.1k - Something sweet that goes great with your Cocoa.
  • swift-protobufstars3.5k - A plugin and runtime library for using Google's Protocol Buffer.
  • Swiftbotstars55 - run swift code on slack.
  • SwifterSwiftstars9.7k - A handy collection of more than 500 native extensions to boost your productivity.
  • SwiftGen-Storyboardstars7.1k - A tool to auto-generate enums for all your Storyboards, Scenes and Segues constants + appropriate convenience accessors.
  • SwiftLinkPreviewstars1.2k - It makes a preview from an url, grabbing all information such as title, relevant texts and images.
  • SwiftPlantUMLstars56 - A command-line tool and Swift Package to generate UML class from your Swift source code. Also available as Xcode Source Editor Extension.
  • SwiftRandomstars554 - A tiny generator of random data.
  • SwiftRaterstars225 - A utility that reminds your iPhone app's users to review the app.
  • SwiftTweaksstars1.3k - Tweak your iOS app without recompiling.
  • Swiftxstars219 - Functional data types and functions for any project.
  • SwiftyUtilsstars494 - All the reusable code that we need in each project.
  • Swiftzstars3.3k - Functional programming.
  • Thenstars3.5k - Super sweet syntactic sugar for initializers.
  • TSAOstars135 - Type-Safe Associated Objects.
  • URLQueryItemEncoderstars59 - An Encoder for encoding any Encodable value into an array of URLQueryItem.
  • UTIKitstars246 - an UTI (Uniform Type Identifier) wrapper.
  • Vaccinestars293 - Make your apps immune to recompile-decease.
  • WeakableSelfstars64 - A micro-framework to encapsulate [weak self] and guard statements within closures.
  • WhatsNewstars1.5k - Showcase new features after an app update similar to Pages, Numbers and Keynote.
  • WhatsNewKitstars2.2k - Showcase your awesome new app features.
  • XestiMonitorsstars268 - An extensible monitoring framework.
  • ZamzamKitstars241 - A collection of micro utilities and extensions for Standard Library, Foundation and UIKit.

Validation

A collection of validation libs. back to top

  • ATGValidatorstars46 - Rule based validation framework with form and card validation support for iOS.
  • FormValidatorSwiftstars495 - Allows you to validate inputs of text fields and text views in a convenient way.
  • Input Maskstars500 - Pattern-based user input formatter, parser and validator for iOS.
  • RxValidatorstars155 - Simple, Extensible, Flexible Validation Checker.
  • SwiftValidatorstars1.4k - A rule-based validation library.
  • SwiftValidatorsstars227 - String validation for iOS (inspired by validator.js).
  • ValidatedPropertyKitstars719 - Easily validate your Properties with Property Wrappers 👮.
  • Validatorstars1.4k - Drop in user input validation for your iOS apps.

Phone Numbers

Libs to manage phone numbers. back to top

  • NKVPhonePickerstars132 - An UITextField subclass to simplify country code's picking.
  • PhoneNumberKitstars4.1k - Framework for parsing, formatting and validating international phone numbers. Inspired by Google's libphonenumber.

Version Manager

back to top

  • AppVersionMonitorstars256 - Monitor iOS app version easily.
  • Sirenstars3.8k - Notify users when a new version of your app is available and prompt them to upgrade.
  • Versionstars162 - Version represents and compares semantic versions.
  • Version Tracker Swiftstars77 - Versions tracker for your iOS, OS X, and tvOS app.

Video

back to top

  • BMPlayerstars1.7k - A video player for iOS, based on AVPlayer, support the horizontal, vertical screen. support adjust volume, brigtness and seek by slide.
  • Cabbagestars1.1k - A video composition framework build on top of AVFoundation.
  • Kitsunebistars216 - Overlay alpha channel video animation player view using OpenGLES.
  • MMPlayerViewstars698 - Custom AVPlayerLayer on view and transition player with good effect like YouTube and Facebook.
  • MobilePlayerstars2.9k - A powerful and completely customizable media player for iOS.
  • NextLevelSessionExporterstars178 - Export and transcode media.
  • Playerstars1.8k - iOS video player, simple drop in component for playing and streaming media.
  • PlayerViewstars124 - Easy to use video player using a UIView, manage rate of reproduction, screenshots and callbacks-delegate for player state.
  • PryntTrimmerViewstars578 - Trim and crop videos.
  • SwiftFFmpegstars253 - A wrapper for the FFmpeg C API.
  • SwiftVideoBackgroundstars306 - Easy to Use UIView subclass for implementating a video background.
  • Swifty360Playerstars122 - iOS 360-degree video player streaming from an AVPlayer.
  • VGPlayerstars384 - A simple iOS video player, support play local and network, background playback mode, automatic caching while playing.

Serverless

  • Azure Functions for Swiftstars80 - Swift Worker for Azure Functions.

Contributing

Please take a quick look at the contribution guidelines first. If you see a package or project here that is no longer maintained or is not a good fit, please submit a pull request to improve this file. Thank you to all contributors; you rock!!
